v1CanRespondToReviewRequest.description: Request message for checking whether a review supports responses.

businessId.description: Required. The ID of the business owning the review.

reviewId.description: Required. The ID of the review being responded to.

v1CanRespondToReviewRequest.title: Can Respond To Review Request

v1CanRespondToReviewResponse.description: Response message indicating whether a review supports responses.

canRespond.description: Output only. Represents whether or not the response is supported.

unsupportedReason.description: Output only. A message with the reason the review doesn't support responses.

v1CanRespondToReviewResponse.title: Can Respond To Review Response

v1ContactDetails.description: Information about the customer (contact) who submitted the NPS score.

email.description: Output only. Customer’s email address, if available.

phone.description: Output only. Customer’s phone number, if available.

v1ContactDetails.title: Contact Details

v1CreateReviewCommentRequest.description: Request message for creating a comment on a review.

commentText.description: Required. The text content of the comment.

commenterEmail.description: Optional. The email of the commenter.

commenterName.description: Optional. The name of the commenter.

postedByDigitalAgent.description: Optional. Whether this comment is posted by a digital agent.

postedByOwner.description: Optional. Whether this comment is posted by the listing owner.

shouldPublish.description: Optional. Whether the comment should be published immediately.

v1CreateReviewCommentRequest.title: Create Review Comment Request

v1CreateReviewCommentResponse.description: Response message containing the created review comment details.

commentId.description: Output only. The ID of the created comment.

commentText.description: Output only. The text content of the comment.

commenterName.description: Output only. The name of the commenter.

created.description: Output only. The creation date of the comment.

postedByOwner.description: Output only. Whether this comment is a post by the owner of the listing being reviewed.

published.description: Output only. The published date of the comment.

v1CreateReviewCommentResponse.title: Create Review Comment Response

v1ForceRefreshListingRequest.description: Request message to force refresh a specific listing.

accountGroupId.description: Required. The account group ID which the listing belongs to.

listingId.description: Required. The ID of the listing which needs to be force refreshed.

listingUrl.description: Optional. The URL of the listing which needs to be force refreshed.

sourceId.description: Optional. The source of the listing.

v1ForceRefreshListingRequest.title: Force Refresh Listing Request

v1GetListingsRequest.description: Request message for retrieving a set of listings by their identifiers.

listingIds.description: Required. A set of listing identifiers to retrieve.

v1GetListingsRequest.title: Get Listings Request

v1GetListingsResponse.description: Response message containing the retrieved listings.
v1GetListingsResponse.title: Get Listings Response

v1GetMultiThirdPartyReviewPublishSetting.description: Request message for retrieving third-party review publish settings for multiple account groups.

accountGroupIds.description: Required. The account group IDs to retrieve publish settings for.

v1GetMultiThirdPartyReviewPublishSetting.title: Get Multi Third Party Review Publish Settings Request

v1GetMultiThirdPartyReviewPublishSetting.description: Response message containing third-party review publish settings keyed by account group ID.

thirdPartyReviewPublishSettings.description: Output only. The third-party review publish settings keyed by account group ID.

v1GetMultiThirdPartyReviewPublishSetting.title: Get Multi Third Party Review Publish Settings Response

v1GetNetPromoterScoreDetailsRequest.description: Request message for retrieving NPS redirect configuration details.

netPromoterScoreId.description: Required. The NPS record ID to get details for.

v1GetNetPromoterScoreDetailsRequest.title: Get Net Promoter Score Details Request

v1GetNetPromoterScoreDetailsResponse.description: Response message containing NPS redirect configuration details.

npsRedirectReviewSource.description: Output only. Whether to redirect to the review source when score >= nps_redirect_threshold.

npsRedirectThreshold.description: Output only. Effective redirect threshold (6-10). Server resolves unset/invalid stored values to the default before returning.

reviewSourceId.description: Output only. The review source ID to redirect to.

v1GetNetPromoterScoreDetailsResponse.title: Get Net Promoter Score Details Response

v1GetReviewMetricsRequest.description: Request message for retrieving review metrics for one or more business namespaces.

maxDateTime.description: Optional. Filter reviews published on or before this date (RFC3339 UTC, inclusive).

minDateTime.description: Optional. Filter reviews published on or after this date (RFC3339 UTC, inclusive).

namespaces.description: Required. The IDs of the namespace(s) you wish to get metrics for. A namespace may be an account_group_id (AG-) or multi-location-group (G-).

partnerId.description: Required. Partner ID of the namespaces provided in the request (e.g., "ABC").

sourceNames.description:
Optional. Filter by source platform. To filter multiple platforms, provide multiple elements in the array.
Each entry in this repeated field must be a single source name Example: ["Google", "Yelp", "Facebook"].

splitGroupsIntoAccounts.description:
Optional. Controls metric aggregation granularity for review data.
When false (default): Returns aggregated metrics at the group level (e.g., for multi-location group G-12345).
When true: Returns metrics split by individual account group IDs within the parent group, providing more detailed breakdowns.
Use this when you need to analyze performance differences between individual locations or accounts within a larger organizational group.
Example: A franchise with 10 locations would get 10 separate metric entries instead of 1 combined entry.

v1GetReviewMetricsRequest.title: Get Review Metrics Request

v1GetReviewMetricsResponse.description: Response message containing review metrics grouped by namespace.

metricsForNamespace.description: Output only. Review metrics grouped by namespace.

v1GetReviewMetricsResponse.title: Get Review Metrics Response

v1GetReviewsRequest.description: Request message for retrieving a set of reviews by their identifiers.

includeComments.description: Optional. Whether or not to include comments on the reviews.

reviewIds.description: Required. The set of review IDs to retrieve.

v1GetReviewsRequest.title: Get Reviews Request

v1GetReviewsResponse.description: Response message containing the retrieved reviews.
v1GetReviewsResponse.title: Get Reviews Response

v1ImportNPSRequest.description: Request message for importing an NPS record, primarily for importing historical data from external systems.

attributes.description:
Optional. Additional attributes associated with the NPS score (key-value pairs).
This will be used to store meta data that provides additional context of the NPS feedback.

comment.description: Optional. Customer comment provided along with the score.

crmContactId.description: Required. CRM Contact ID of the customer.

externalReviewRequestId.description: Required. Unique external identifier for the review request. Used for deduplication.

npsExternalId.description: Optional. External NPS identifier for tracking.

providerIds.description: Optional. Provider IDs (IAM user IDs starting with "U-") associated with this NPS.

requestSentTime.description: Required. Time when the request was sent.

score.description: Optional. NPS score (0-10). Set if customer has already left a score.

scoreLeft.description: Optional. Time when the score was left by the customer.

status.title:
Optional. Status of the review request.
Status mapping:
  "sending" -> Sending
  "sent" -> Sent
  "delivered" -> Delivered
  "opened" -> Opened
  "clicked" -> Clicked
  "failed" -> Failed
Unmapped statuses (mapped to Invalid):
  blocked, null, processing_attachments, undelivered, received, skipped
Default behavior when status is empty/not provided:
  - If score or comment is present -> Opened
  - If no score and no comment -> Invalid

triggeringActivityIds.description: Optional. Triggering activity IDs that initiated this review request.

v1ImportNPSRequest.title: Import NPS Request

v1ImportNPSResponse.description: Response message containing the ID of the created NPS record.

netPromoterScoreId.description: Output only. The NPS record ID (starts with "NPS-").

v1ImportNPSResponse.title: Import NPS Response

v1LeaveNetPromoterScoreRequest.description: Request message for submitting or updating a Net Promoter Score.

comment.description: Optional. Comment seen in some UI, so we know what score it was associated with.

netPromoterScoreId.description: Required. NPS ID of the entity that will be updated.

score.description: Required. The NPS score that was picked on scale of 1 to 10.

v1LeaveNetPromoterScoreRequest.title: Leave Net Promoter Score Request

v1ListNetPromoterScoresRequest.description: Request message for listing Net Promoter Score records with optional filtering and pagination.

accountGroupId.description: Required. Business account ID (starts with "AG-") to list NPS scores for.

cursor.description:
Optional. Pagination cursor from the previous response. Should be omitted when fetching the first page of results.
For subsequent pages, the cursor value from the previous response should be used.
Cursors are opaque tokens and must be used exactly as returned. Cursor values should not be generated or modified.

hideParent.description: When set to true, parent NPS records (primary feedback marked is_parent=true and referenced by other NPS records via ParentNPSID) are excluded from the response. When set to false, the parent NPS records are included in the response.

includeTriggeringActivityDetails.description: When set to true, triggering_activity_details will be populated with CRM activity information for each NPS record. When set to false, triggering_activity_details will be empty.

pageSize.description:
Optional. Number of items to return per page.
This value must be less than or equal to 500.

v1ListNetPromoterScoresRequest.title: List Net Promoter Scores Request

v1ListNetPromoterScoresRequestFilters.description: Optional filtering criteria for narrowing NPS results.

contactNames.title:
Optional. Filter NPS records by contact names using fuzzy text search.
A contact is the CRM customer who received the service and submitted the NPS feedback.
This performs a case-insensitive search against the contact.name field.
Multiple names can be provided to filter for records matching any of the specified contact names.
example: ["Jane Smith", "Michael Johnson", "Sarah Davis"]

fromDate.description: Optional. Include NPS scores submitted on or after this timestamp (RFC3339 UTC, inclusive).

hasProviderAssociation.description:
Optional. Filter NPS records based on whether they have associated providers.
A provider is the employee or service provider who delivered the service to the contact.
When true, returns only NPS records that have provider associations (populated provider_ids or providers fields).
When false, returns only NPS records that do NOT have provider associations.
When omitted/null, returns all NPS records regardless of provider association status.

providerIds.title:
This field filters NPS records by provider (employee) internal IAM user ID (starts with "U-") and not by provider name.
Note: This identifies the employee/provider who provided the service, not the customer (contact) who submitted the NPS.
Accepts IDs only; names are not supported.
example: ["U-e3bbb42b-c464-4326-9c09-aa8cfc45e0b3", "U-fa09664d-698d-4349-926f-147fb55e2a72"]

providerNames.title:
Optional. Filter NPS records by provider names using fuzzy text search.
A provider is the employee or service provider who delivered the service to the customer.
This performs a case-insensitive search against the names in the providers field.
Multiple names can be provided to filter for records matching any of the specified provider names.
example: ["John Doe", "Sarah Johnson", "Mike Smith"]

scoreCategory.description: Optional. Filter by NPS score categories: DETRACTORS (0-6), PASSIVES (7-8), PROMOTERS (9-10).

toDate.description: Optional. Include NPS scores submitted on or before this timestamp (RFC3339 UTC, inclusive).

v1ListNetPromoterScoresResponse.description: Response message containing NPS records matching the search criteria with pagination metadata.

cursor.description:
Output only. Cursor for the next page. This value should be used in the next request's cursor field.
Empty string means no more pages. The cursor is an opaque token. It must be used exactly as returned and should not be modified or generated.

hasMore.description: Output only. Whether there are more results available.

netPromoterScore.description: Output only. NPS score records matching the search criteria for the current page. Empty list if no matches.

totalResults.description: Output only. Total count of NPS scores matching criteria across all pages.

v1ListNetPromoterScoresResponse.title: List Net Promoter Scores Response

v1Listing.description: Represents a business listing on an external source, including NAP data, match quality, and timestamps.

created.description: Output only. When the listing was created in the system.

domain.description: Output only. The domain of the listing URL.

externalId.description: Output only. The external ID of the listing.

lastScraped.description: Output only. When the listing was last scraped by the system.

lastUserRefresh.description: Output only. When the listing was refreshed by the user.

matches.description: Output only. A list of which fields match the business's NAP data (companyName, city, state).

missing.description: Output only. Indicates if the listing is missing from the source's site.

missingOn.description: Output only. When the listing was found missing by the system.

modified.description: Output only. When the listing was last modified by the system.

score.description: Output only. The score of the listing.

sourceId.description: Output only. The source that the listing belongs to.

url.description: Output only. The URL of the listing.

userSubmitted.description: Output only. Indicates if the listing was submitted by the user.

verified.description: Output only. Indicates if the listing was marked verified by the user.

v1Listing.title: Listing

v1ListingIdentifier.description: Uniquely identifies a listing by its account group and listing ID.

accountGroupId.description: Required. The account group ID that owns the listing.

v1ListingIdentifier.title: Listing Identifier

v1LookupListingsRequest.description: Request message for looking up listings for a business, with filtering options by source and match quality.

businessId.description: Required. The business ID to look up listings for.

includeAnchorDataMatches.description: Optional. Whether to include anchor data matches.

includeGoodListings.description: Optional. Whether to include good listings.

includeInternetProviderListings.description: Optional. Whether to include internet provider listings.

includeNotDoneListings.description: Optional. Whether to include not-done listings.

includePoorListings.description: Optional. Whether to include poor listings.

sourceIds.description: Optional. The source IDs to filter listings by.

v1LookupListingsRequest.title: Lookup Listings Request

v1LookupListingsResponse.description: Response message containing listings grouped by source.

listingsBySource.description: Output only. The listings grouped by source.

v1LookupListingsResponse.title: Lookup Listings Response

v1LookupResponseForSource.description: Listings grouped by match quality for a single source.

goodListings.description: Output only. Listings with good match quality.

notDoneListings.description: Output only. Listings that are not yet done.

poorListings.description: Output only. Listings with poor match quality.

userFriendlySourceName.description: Output only. The user-friendly source name.

v1LookupResponseForSource.title: Lookup Response For Source

v1MetricsForSource.description: Review metrics for a single source platform, including rating distribution and response statistics.

ratingFiveStar.description: Output only. Number of 5 star ratings from this source.

ratingFourStar.description: Output only. Number of 4 star ratings from this source.

ratingNone.description: Output only. Number of reviews with no rating from this source.

ratingOneStar.description: Output only. Number of 1 star ratings from this source.

ratingThreeStar.description: Output only. Number of 3 star ratings from this source.

ratingTwoStar.description: Output only. Number of 2 star ratings from this source.

respondedTo.description:
Output only. Number of reviews responded to by the business on this source.
Only applies to sources that support business responses in platform.

responseRate.description: Output only. The percentage of reviews responded to from this source.

responseTimeHours.description: Output only. The average number of hours it takes to respond to reviews from this source.

reviewRating.description: Output only. The average rating from this source.

sourceName.description: Output only. The name of the site that the reviews are from.

totalReviews.description: Output only. Total number of reviews from this source.

v1MetricsForSource.title: Metrics For Source

v1NAP.description: Name, Address, and Phone (NAP) information of a listing.
v1NAP.title: NAP

v1NPSProviderDetails.description: Information about a provider (employee) associated with an NPS record.

id.title:
Output only. IAM user ID of the provider (starts with "U-") created or linked when the NPS was received.
Used to fetch provider details such as first name, last name, and external ID from IAM.
example: "U-e3bbb42b-c464-4326-9c09-aa8cfc45e0b3"

name.description: Output only. Full name of the provider (example: "John Doe").

v1NPSProviderDetails.title: NPS Provider Details

v1NetPromoterScore.description: A customer's Net Promoter Score (NPS) submission, indicating how likely they are to recommend the business.

accountGroupId.description: Output only. Business account ID (starts with "AG-") associated with this NPS score.

attributes.description: Output only. Additional attributes associated with the NPS score (key-value pairs).

comment.description: Output only. Optional customer comment provided along with the score.

contactExternalId.description: Output only. Contact external id of the user who submitted the NPS score.

contactId.title:
Output only. CRM Contact ID of the customer who submitted the NPS score.
This identifies the customer who provided the feedback, not the employee/provider who provided the service.
example: "ContactID-cb3671fd-9cb6-4f8c-86b6-f604e6150aeb"

created.description: Output only. Timestamp when the record was created (RFC3339 UTC).

deleted.description: Output only. Timestamp when the record was deleted, if applicable (RFC3339 UTC).

netPromoterScoreId.description: Output only. Unique identifier for the Net Promoter Score record starts with 'NPS-'.

npsExternalId.description:
Output only. External NPS identifier for imported NPS records.
This field stores the external identifier provided during NPS data migration through the ImportNPS API.
It is used for deduplication and reconciliation against the source system.

providerIds.title:
Output only. List of IAM user IDs for providers (employees) associated with this NPS record.
These IDs are created or linked when the NPS is received and are used to fetch
example: ["U-e3bbb42b-c464-4326-9c09-aa8cfc45e0b3", "U-fa09664d-698d-4349-926f-147fb55e2a72"]

providers.title:
Output only. List of providers (employees) associated with this NPS record.
example: [{id:"U-e3bbb42b-c464-4326-9c09-aa8cfc45e0b3", name: "John Doe"}, {id:"U-fa09664d-698d-4349-926f-147fb55e2a72", name:"Julie"}]

reviewRequestRecordId.description: Output only. ID of the review request for which the customer submitted this NPS feedback.

score.description: Output only. The NPS score value on a scale of 0-10.

scoreLeftTime.description: Output only. Timestamp when the NPS score was submitted by the customer (RFC3339 UTC).

triggeringActivityDetails.description:
Output only. Details of the CRM activities that triggered this NPS request.
This field is populated only when:
1) include_triggering_activity_details is set to true in the request, and
2) the NPS request was triggered from a third-party integration that stored triggering_activity_ids in the NPS record.

updated.description: Output only. Timestamp when the record was last updated (RFC3339 UTC).

v1NetPromoterScore.title: Net Promoter Score

v1NetPromoterScoreAttribute.description: A key-value pair providing additional metadata for an NPS record.

value.description: Output only. The attribute value corresponding to the key.

v1NetPromoterScoreAttribute.title: Net Promoter Score Attribute

v1Recommendation.title: Enum for a review's facebook recommendation value

v1Review.description: Customer feedback about a business with ratings, comments, and responses.

comments.description: Output only. Business responses to this review.

contactExternalId.description: Output only. Contact external id of the user who gave the review.

contactId.title: Output only. Contact id of the user who gave the review. (Eg: ContactID-731b80b1-1aae-49ff-8c21-d43aa01e1bf8)

content.description: Output only. Full review text. May be empty for star-only reviews.

created.description: Output only. When review was ingested into system (RFC3339 UTC). May differ from published.

deleted.description: Output only. When review was deleted (RFC3339 UTC). Zero timestamp = not deleted.

domain.description: Output only. Platform domain indicating the source where the review was provided. (e.g., "google.com", "yelp.com").

edited.description: Output only. When review was last edited by customer (RFC3339 UTC).

externalId.description: Output only. Platform's native review identifier (opaque string, often base64-encoded).

hasAccuratePublished.description: Output only. Whether published timestamp is accurate (true) or estimated (false, e.g., midday UTC).

isPublished.description: Output only. Whether review is published.

isSharedByReviewer.description: Output only. Whether reviewer shared review beyond original platform.

lastFailedReviewCommentCreated.description: Output only. When most recent response attempt failed (RFC3339 UTC). Zero timestamp = no failures.

lastFailedReviewCommentReason.description: Output only. Error reason for failed response attempt. Empty = no failure.

lastFailedReviewCommentText.description: Output only. Text of failed response attempt. Empty = no failed response.

listingId.description: Output only. Business location identifier. Format: "LIS-" prefix + alphanumeric.

modified.description: Output only. When review record was last updated (RFC3339 UTC).

newComment.description: Output only. Whether there's an unacknowledged business response.

originalStars.description: Output only. Platform rating * 1000. 5-star: 1000-5000, 10-point: 1000-10000, half-star: includes 1500, 2500, etc.

published.description: Output only. When customer published review on platform (RFC3339 UTC).

rating.description: Output only. Star rating as string. Values: "1", "2", "3", "4", "5".

scaledStars.description: Output only. Normalized rating (0-1000 scale, linear interpolation across platforms).

sourceId.description:
Output only. Internal platform ID. Common: 10010 (Google), 10000 (Yelp), 10050 (Facebook).
For readable names, use source_name (field 31).

sourceName.description: Output only. Readable platform name (e.g., "Google", "Yelp"). May be empty; use source_id as fallback.

title.description: Output only. Truncated review text. No ellipsis added if truncated.

url.description: Output only. Direct URL to review on platform.

v1Review.title: Review

v1ReviewActionStatus.title: Enum for the action status of a review

v1ReviewComment.description: A business response or comment on a customer review.

accountGroupId.description: Output only. Business account ID (starts with "AG-").

created.description: Output only. When comment was created in the system (RFC3339 UTC).

email.description: Output only. Email address of commenter.

externalId.description: Output only. Platform's native identifier for this comment.

modified.description: Output only. When comment was last updated in the system (RFC3339 UTC).

name.description: Output only. Display name of commenter (e.g., "Owner" or business name).

postedByAi.description: Output only. Whether automatically posted by the reputation specialist (true) or someone else (false).

postedByDigitAgent.description: Output only. Whether posted by a digital agent (true) or manually by a human (false).

postedByOwner.description: Output only. Whether posted by the business owner (true) or someone else (false).

published.description: Output only. When comment was published on the review platform (RFC3339 UTC).

reviewId.description: Output only. Parent review ID (starts with "RVW-").

text.description: Output only. Full text content of the business's response.

v1ReviewComment.title: Review Comment

v1ReviewDeletedStatus.title: Enum for the deleted status of a review

v1ReviewHistory.description: A historical snapshot of a review, capturing the state of the review at a point in time.

accountGroupId.description: Output only. Business identifier of the review history.

content.description: Output only. The review content body.

created.description: Output only. When the review history was created in the system.

externalId.description: Output only. The sources identifier of the review.

listingId.description: Output only. The listing id that the review belongs to.

partnerId.description: Output only. The partner ID associated with the review.

published.description: Output only. When the review was published.

reviewHistoryId.description: Output only. Identifier of the review history.

reviewId.description: Output only. Review id that the review history belongs to.

reviewLastEdited.description: Output only. When the review was last modified on the source site.

reviewerName.description: Output only. Name of the reviewer.

scaledStarRating.description: Output only. The scaled stars of the review.

source.description: Output only. The source that the review belongs to.

v1ReviewHistory.title: Review History

v1ReviewHistoryRequest.description: Request message for retrieving the history of a review.

reviewId.description: Required. The ID of the review to retrieve history for.

v1ReviewHistoryRequest.title: Review History Request

v1ReviewHistoryResponse.description: Response message containing the history entries for a review.

reviewHistory.description: Output only. The history entries for the review.

v1ReviewHistoryResponse.title: Review History Response

v1ReviewIdentifier.description: Uniquely identifies a review by its account group and review ID.

accountGroupId.description: Required. The account group ID that owns the review.

v1ReviewIdentifier.title: Review Identifier

v1ReviewMetrics.description: Aggregated review metrics for a single namespace, broken down by source platform.

metricsForSource.description: Output only. Review metrics broken down by source platform.

namespace.description: Output only. The ID of the namespace the metrics are fetched for. A namespace may be an account_group_id (AG-) or multi-location-group (G-).

v1ReviewMetrics.title: Review Metrics

v1Reviewer.description: Person who wrote a review, including their display name and contact details.

email.description: Output only. Email address. Often empty due to platform privacy settings.

name.description: Output only. Display name as shown on platform (e.g., "John Doe" or "Jane D.").

url.description: Output only. URL to reviewer's profile on the platform. May be empty.

v1Reviewer.title: Reviewer

v1SearchReviewsRequest.description: Request message for searching customer reviews with filtering and pagination.

cursor.description:
Optional. Pagination cursor from the previous response. Should be omitted when fetching the first page of results.
For subsequent pages, the cursor value from the previous response should be used.
Cursors are opaque tokens and must be used exactly as returned. Cursor values should not be generated or modified.

includeComments.description:
Optional. Include business response comments in results. Default: false.
Supported platforms: Google (one comment), Facebook, My Listing, Apartments.com, ApartmentRatings.

listingName.description: Optional. Listing name to filter reviews for a specific location.

maxDateTime.description: Optional. Filter reviews published on or before this date (RFC3339 UTC, inclusive).

minDateTime.description: Optional. Filter reviews published on or after this date (RFC3339 UTC, inclusive).

orderByCreatedDateDescending.description:
Optional. Sort by system creation date descending (newest first).
Cannot be true if order_by_published_date_descending is true.

orderByPublishedDateDescending.description:
Optional. Sort by published date descending (newest first).
Cannot be true if order_by_created_date_descending is true.

pageSize.description: Optional. An integer representing the number of reviews returned per page. This value must not exceed 500.

phrase.description: Optional. Search for reviews containing this text (case-insensitive).

rating.description:
Optional. Filter by rating: "1"-"5" (exact), "L" (1-2 stars), "H" (4-5 stars), "N" (no rating).
Can accept single value or comma-separated list (e.g., "1,3,5" or "L,H").

ratingValues.description:
Optional. Filter by rating values: "1"-"5" (exact), "L" (1-2 stars), "H" (4-5 stars), "N" (no rating).
Each entry in this repeated field must be one rating token. (e.g., ["1","3","5"] or ["L","H"]).

sourceIds.description:
Optional. Filter by internal source platform IDs. This field should only be used when numeric IDs are explicitly available.
Each entry must be a single ID string. Example: ["10010", "10000", "10050"].
Note: When filtering by platform names (e.g., "Google", "Yelp"), source_names field should be used instead.

sourceName.description:
Optional. Filter by source platform (e.g., "Google", "Yelp", "Facebook").
Can accept single value or comma-separated list. (e.g., "Google,Yelp").

sourceNames.description:
Optional. Filter by source platform name (e.g., "Google", "Yelp", "Facebook").
This is the preferred field for filtering by platform names.
To filter multiple platforms, multiple elements should be provided in the array.
Each entry must be a single source name. Example: ["Google", "Yelp", "Facebook"].

v1SearchReviewsRequest.title: Search Reviews Request

v1SearchReviewsResponse.description: Response message containing reviews matching the search criteria with pagination metadata.

cursor.description:
Output only. Cursor for the next page. This value should be used in the next request's cursor field.
Empty string means no more pages. The cursor is an opaque token. It must be used exactly as returned and should not be modified or generated.

hasMore.description: Output only. Whether or not more results exist.

reviews.description: Output only. Reviews matching the search criteria for the current page. Empty list if no matches.

totalResults.description: Output only. Total count of reviews matching criteria across all pages.

v1SearchReviewsResponse.title: Search Reviews Response

v1ThirdPartyPublishedStatus.description: - THIRD_PARTY_PUBLISHED_STATUS_EMPTY: Empty means the auto-publish minimum rating setting determines whether it's published or not
v1ThirdPartyPublishedStatus.title: Enum for review third party published status

v1ThirdPartyReviewPublishSettings.description: Settings controlling how third-party reviews are published to the review widget.

minimumPublishRating.description: Output only. The minimum star rating to auto-publish reviews, 0 means only manually published reviews.

widgetAllReviewsEnabled.description: Output only. Whether the widget can show reviews for all sources.

v1ThirdPartyReviewPublishSettings.title: Third Party Review Publish Settings

v1TriggeringActivityDetail.description: Information about the CRM activity that triggered the NPS request.

standardActivitySourceName.description: Output only. Source name of the transaction/job e.g. (Neighborly, serviceTitan etc).

systemActivityCreated.description: Output only. System creation timestamp of the activity.

systemActivityEffective.description: Output only. Timestamp of the job/transaction.

systemActivityExternalId.description: Output only. Job ID of the source system of the transaction.

systemActivityId.description: Output only. Transaction ID from the source system.

v1TriggeringActivityDetail.title: Triggering Activity Detail

isSharedByReviewer.description: Optional. Whether the review is shared by the reviewer.

newComment.description: Optional. Whether there is a new comment on the review.

reviewId.description: Output only. The ID of the updated review.

paths.description: The set of field mask paths.

vendastatypesFieldMask.title: `FieldMask` represents a set of symbolic field paths, for example:

scopes.business-app: Allows the application to manage all features of Business App
scopes.reputation: Allows the application to manage reputation reports for your clients' businesses
scopes.reputation.nps:read: Allows the application view-only access to NPS data for the business locations you have access to
scopes.reputation.review:read: Allows the application view-only access to retrieve reviews for the business locations you have access to
